name: code-review
description: Review diffs and entire codebases, then iterate on implementation work until every relevant check is clean.

interface.shortDescription: Review changes, audit codebases, and verify fixes
interface.longDescription: Run focused reviews of diffs and pull requests, dispatch parallel deep reviews across whole codebases, and execute iterative post-implementation checks covering plan completeness, tests, linting, security, performance, correctness, and project consistency.
defaultPrompt: Review these changes before I merge them.
Run a deep review of this codebase.
Verify this implementation until every check is clean.
